label: Canar Rebuild - Simulator
info: Fuel tanker monitoring rebuild. Generates dummy 140-byte sensor packets for 6 virtual tanks across Sudan, decodes them faithfully using the original Canar binary protocol, and pushes JSON updates over WebSocket at /ws/tanks for the React dashboard.

env.name: Devices

name: Tank Simulator (6 devices)
Data to Process (Decoder)
Format for WebSocket
Canar Rebuild - Simulator Flow
info:
Pipeline:

[Inject every 5s]
   -> [Tank Simulator]
        Generates one 140-byte binary buffer per device (6 devices).
        State per IMEI evolves: drains, occasional refills, rare drop events.
   -> [Data to Process (Decoder)]
        Faithful rebuild of original Canar decoder. Returns one combined object.
   -> [Format for WebSocket]
        Enriches with site info (lat/long/city) and shapes for the frontend.
   -> [WS /ws/tanks]
        Pushed live to ws://<host>:1880/ws/tanks

Configure 6 devices via the tab's env var 'Devices'.
